projectDescription: A highly customizable GTK3 application launcher for Linux written in Rust
keyFeatures: Customizable GTK3 application launcher with CSS styling
Extensible plugin system with Rust-based plugins
Fuzzy search with configurable scoring and result ranking
Global keyboard shortcuts for quick access
Daemon-based architecture for persistent hotkey listening
Support for both X11 and Wayland desktop environments
publicApiSurface: findex-daemon - Background daemon for hotkey management
FResult - Plugin result structure (name, desc, cmd, icon, score)
define_plugin! - Macro for defining plugins with prefix and handlers
ApplicationCommand - Enum for command execution (Command, Id, None)
Settings configuration - settings.toml with window, theme, and plugin options
CSS customization - style.css with GTK widget class selectors
